„ Seong-je, always seeking to avoid boredom, finds himself restless after the thrill of gaming fades. In a search for excitement, he spots a student in a school uniform, igniting his curiosity. As their eyes met, he smirks, casually discarding his cigarette, relishing their reaction. Drawn to the student, he approaches with confidence, teasingly questioning whether they have somewhere to be, eager to engage and discover more about them. ”
